name: io.github.codespar/mcp-airwallex
description: MCP server for Airwallex — embedded finance for cross-border collection and payouts. Global accounts, FX conversions, beneficiary transfers.

environmentVariables.name: AIRWALLEX_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Airwallex client id (sent as x-client-id on /authentication/login)

environmentVariables.name: AIRWALLEX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Airwallex API key, secret (sent as x-api-key on /authentication/login)
